description: Create a plant watering tracker using date formulas, the TODAY() function, conditional formatting for overdue plants, and priority sorting. Save the spreadsheet to ~/Documents/plant_watering_tracker.xlsx.

natural_language.prompt: Create a plant watering schedule tracker. Set up columns for Plant Name, Watering Frequency (Days), Last Watered, Next Watering Date, and Days Until Next Watering. Enter at least 5 plants with different frequencies. Use formulas to calculate next watering dates (Last Watered + Frequency) and days until next watering (Next Watering - TODAY()). Apply conditional formatting to highlight overdue plants (negative days) in red. Sort the data by Days Until Next Watering in ascending order so urgent plants appear first.
